test_cases.test_name: Verify RBAC middleware on PHI read endpoint
test_cases.finding: Direct ORM access to PHI without RBAC check
test_cases.evidence: Route handler `router.get('/list', ...)` at line 28 exposes `prisma.diagnosis.findMany()` without authentication middleware. No `requireAuth` wrapper detected.
test_cases.remediation: Wrap route handler with `requireAuth` middleware and verify `diagnosis:read` permission.

test_cases.test_name: Verify RBAC middleware on PHI write endpoint
test_cases.finding: Direct ORM access to PHI without RBAC check
test_cases.evidence: Route handler `router.post('/', ...)` at line 35 exposes `prisma.diagnosis.create()` without authentication middleware. No `requireAuth` wrapper detected.
test_cases.remediation: Wrap route handler with `requireAuth` middleware and verify `diagnosis:write` permission.

test_cases.test_name: Verify RBAC middleware on PHI delete endpoint
test_cases.finding: Direct ORM access to PHI without RBAC check
test_cases.evidence: Route handler `router.delete('/:id', ...)` at line 51 exposes `prisma.diagnosis.delete()` without authentication middleware. No `requireAuth` wrapper detected.
test_cases.remediation: Wrap route handler with `requireAuth` middleware and verify `diagnosis:delete` permission.

test_cases.test_name: Verify encryption at rest for PHI fields
test_cases.finding: ORM write of PHI without encryption helper
test_cases.evidence: Route handler at line 38 writes PHI fields (`diagnosis`, `icd10Code`, `notes`) directly to database without `encryptAtRest()` wrapper.
test_cases.remediation: Wrap all PHI fields with `encryptAtRest()` from `src/lib/phi-crypto.ts` before database write.

test_cases.test_name: Verify multi-factor authentication on PHI access
test_cases.evidence: Route handler at line 37 verifies JWT token via `jwt.verify()` but does not enforce multi-factor authentication. No MFA gate detected.
test_cases.remediation: Gate verified JWT behind MFA factor (TOTP / WebAuthn). Verify second factor within session window.

test_cases.test_name: Verify HTTPS for outbound PHI transmission
test_cases.evidence: Route handler at line 58 transmits PHI to `http://insurance-partner.example/api/verify` over plain HTTP. No TLS encryption detected.
test_cases.remediation: Replace `http://` with `https://` and pin partner certificate. Implement mutual TLS (mTLS).

test_cases.test_name: Verify HTTPS protocol for outbound URLs
test_cases.finding: Outbound URL — verify HTTPS and not bare HTTP
test_cases.evidence: Route handler at line 58 uses `http://` protocol for outbound fetch to insurance partner API.
test_cases.remediation: Replace `http://` with `https://` and pin partner certificate.

test_cases.test_name: Verify soft-delete and retention policy for PHI records
test_cases.finding: Hard delete of records — review for ePHI
test_cases.evidence: Route handler at line 52 performs hard delete via `prisma.diagnosis.delete()`. No soft-delete column or retention policy detected.
test_cases.remediation: Replace hard delete with soft-delete column (`deletedAt`). Implement 6-year retention policy before permanent deletion.

summary.recommendation: DO NOT MERGE until all blocking violations are remediated.
